name: selenium-test-allure-showcase
description: Allure report showcase — visualiza resultados de ejecuciones del proyecto selenium-test

scripts.report:allure:generate: npm run report:allure:prepare && allure generate ./allure-results -o ./allure-report --clean && node scripts/patch-allure-selenium-logo.js
scripts.report:allure: npm run report:allure:generate && npm run report:allure:open
